cta.successToast: You're on the list! We'll reach out soon.

hero.subheadline: MRR, acquisition channels, real P&L and AI analysis — connected in a single dashboard. Built for SaaS founders who want to grow with clarity.
hero.disclaimer: No credit card · Free during beta

problem.label: // the problem
problem.description: MRR in Stripe. Costs in a spreadsheet. Acquisition in Google Analytics. P&L in Excel. Nothing talks to each other — and you spend hours connecting the dots manually.

items.title: Stripe Dashboard
items.desc: Shows revenue — but not where it came from, what it cost, or what your real margin is.

items.title: Spreadsheets
items.desc: Manual updates, broken formulas, always a month behind. Nobody trusts the numbers.

items.title: Google Analytics
items.desc: Pageviews and sessions — but zero connection to revenue, subscriptions, or real business results.

problem.solutionDesc: One script. One webhook. Funnel → MRR → channels → costs → margin → AI insight — all in real time. Everything your growth team and CFO need, in one place.

items.title: Overview
items.desc: Real-time funnel, KPIs with vs. prior period delta and daily chart. See visits → sign-ups → checkouts → revenue in one screen.

items.title: Recurring Revenue (MRR)
items.desc: MRR, ARR, ARPU, LTV, Churn Rate, Revenue Churn. Subscriber flow Sankey and movement chart: New / Expansion / Contraction / Churn.

items.title: Financials
items.desc: Gross revenue, net revenue, discounts and average ticket. Breakdown by payment method (card, bank transfer) and product category.

items.title: Costs & P&L
items.desc: Add fixed and variable costs (absolute or % of revenue). Real-time P&L: Gross Revenue → Gross Profit → Net Profit → Real Margin.

items.title: Acquisition Channels
items.desc: Revenue, funnel stages, conversion rate and average ticket by source. Visual heatmap and sortable table by any column.

items.title: Landing Pages
items.desc: Which entry pages generate the most revenue? Full funnel metrics by URL, with search, sorting and pagination.

items.title: Events & Debug
items.desc: Real-time event table. Filter by type, billing model, date. Automatic alerts for IDs missing deduplication.

items.title: Subscriptions
items.desc: Active, in trial, past due, canceled — with plan, interval, normalized monthly value and customer ID. Full history.

items.title: Period Comparison
items.desc: Compare two date ranges — overview, channels, financials or landing pages. Side by side or AI summary.

code.label: // setup
code.description: One script tag for funnel and acquisition. One webhook for payments and subscriptions. No backend changes.

steps.title: Add the script tag
steps.desc: Add one line in your <head> with your API Key. Pageviews, UTMs, device and session are tracked automatically.

steps.title: Track funnel events
steps.desc: Call Groware.track() on sign-up, checkout and payment events. The SDK is < 3 kB.

steps.title: Connect your gateway
steps.desc: Paste your Stripe Restricted Key. Groware imports the full history and starts receiving webhooks automatically.

integrations.label: // integrations
integrations.description: Native gateway integrations do the heavy lifting. History sync, real-time webhooks and conversion attribution built in.

items.name: Stripe
items.desc: Full history, subscriptions, renewals, churn. Restricted Key — read-only, no risk.

items.name: Asaas
items.desc: PIX, bank slip, credit card. The dominant gateway for Brazilian SaaS — full native integration.

items.name: Kiwify
items.desc: Digital products and info-products. Payment events, refunds and subscription lifecycle.

items.name: Hotmart
items.desc: Digital marketplace integration. Purchases, subscriptions and affiliate tracking.

items.name: Mercado Pago
items.desc: Payments for marketplace and e-commerce. The most popular platform in Latin America.

items.name: tracker.js
items.desc: Your universal fallback. Works with any checkout. < 3 kB, zero dependencies, auto-tracking.

items.name: Gemini AI
items.desc: Powered by Google Gemini. Analyzes P&L + funnel + channels + recurring revenue. Real-time streaming.

items.name: REST API
items.desc: Send server-side events from any language. Node, Python, Go, Ruby, PHP — any stack.

ai.label: // ai analysis
ai.description: Click "Analyze with AI" on the Costs screen and Groware sends your full P&L, funnel and channels to Gemini — returning prioritized insights with real-time streaming.
ai.panelSub: Gemini analyzes your costs and identifies opportunities

features.title: Real business context
features.desc: AI receives detailed P&L (fixed, variable, margins), funnel with conversion rates, average ticket and organization name.

features.title: Period comparison
features.desc: Compare two date ranges with AI analysis. Understand what changed between periods with a clear, structured response.

features.title: Real-time streaming
features.desc: The response arrives fragment by fragment, directly in the dashboard. Blinking cursor while the AI thinks.

ai.mockupDiagnosisLine: Your real margin of <highlight>61.6%</highlight> is <above>above average</above> for B2C SaaS.

metrics.label: // revenue attribution
metrics.description: Each payment is attributed to its acquisition source — even payments made via gateway webhook, months after the first click.
metrics.tableSub: 5 channels with revenue · sorted by revenue

ctaSection.description: Get early access to Groware and turn your scattered data into growth decisions — before your competitors do.
ctaSection.disclaimer: Free during beta · No card · 5-minute setup

sections.title: 1. Information we collect
sections.content: Groware collects information necessary to provide the analytics service. This includes event data sent by your script (tracker.js), payment data synced via gateway integrations, and your account information (name, email, organization).
sections.extra: Event data is processed anonymously by default. We recommend using the hashAnonymous() function to anonymize customer identifiers before sending them to Groware.

sections.title: 2. How we use your data
sections.intro: We use your data exclusively to:
items: Provide the contracted dashboards and analyses
Process and display revenue, funnel and channel metrics
Generate AI analyses based on your organization's context
Send notifications about configured alerts and reports
Improve the quality and reliability of the service

sections.title: 3. Data sharing
sections.content: We do not sell, rent or share your personal data with third parties for commercial purposes. Data may be shared with service providers essential to platform operation, such as cloud infrastructure providers, always subject to confidentiality agreements.

sections.title: 4. Security
sections.content: We use encryption in transit (TLS) and at rest to protect your data. Access to API keys and integrations is done with the minimum necessary permissions (read-only for Stripe). We recommend keeping your API keys secure and not sharing them publicly.

sections.title: 5. Data retention
sections.content: We retain your data while your account is active. Upon requesting account closure, your data will be deleted within 30 days, except where there is a legal obligation to retain it.

sections.title: 6. Your rights (GDPR)
sections.intro: In accordance with applicable data protection laws, you have the right to:
items: Confirmation of the existence of processing of your data
Access to your personal data
Correction of incomplete, inaccurate or outdated data
Data portability to another provider
Deletion of personal data processed with your consent
Withdrawal of consent at any time

sections.title: 7. Cookies
sections.content: We use essential cookies for authentication and session management. We do not use third-party tracking cookies for advertising purposes.

sections.title: 8. Contact
sections.content: To exercise your rights, for privacy questions or data deletion requests, contact us at

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of terms
sections.content: By accessing or using Groware, you agree to these Terms of Use and our Privacy Policy. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you may not use the service.

sections.title: 2. Service description
sections.content: Groware is a growth and revenue analytics platform for SaaS companies and digital businesses. The service includes MRR dashboards, acquisition channel analysis, P&L, event tracking and AI-powered analysis.

sections.title: 3. Beta period
sections.content: Groware is currently in early access (beta). During this period, the service is offered free of charge. We reserve the right to change plans and pricing with reasonable prior notice to users before the official launch.

sections.title: 4. Acceptable use
sections.intro: You agree not to use Groware to:
items: Violate any applicable law or regulation
Transmit sensitive personal data without the data subject's proper consent
Attempt to gain unauthorized access to other users' systems or data
Reverse engineer or copy the service
Send non-anonymized customer data that could identify individuals

sections.title: 5. Your responsibilities
sections.content: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your access credentials and API keys. Groware is not responsible for damages resulting from unauthorized use of your account by third parties.
sections.extra: You are also responsible for ensuring that data sent to Groware complies with GDPR and other applicable data protection laws for your business.

sections.title: 6. Intellectual property
sections.content: Groware and all its content — including interface, code, brand and documentation — are the exclusive property of Groware and protected by intellectual property laws. These terms do not grant you any license over Groware's intellectual property, except the limited right to use the service.

sections.title: 7. Limitation of liability
sections.content: The service is provided "as is" during the beta period. Groware does not guarantee uninterrupted availability or absence of errors. In no circumstances shall Groware be liable for indirect, incidental or consequential damages arising from the use or inability to use the service.

sections.title: 8. Changes to terms
sections.content: We may update these Terms of Use periodically. We will notify users of significant changes by email or via notice on the platform. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

sections.title: 9. Contact
sections.content: For questions about these Terms of Use, contact us at

changelog.label: // changelog
changelog.title: What changed.
changelog.description: Track all updates, improvements and new features in Groware.

items: Dashboard with funnel, KPIs and daily revenue chart
MRR module with growth, movement and subscriber Sankey
Financials with breakdown by payment method and product category
Costs & P&L with waterfall and AI analysis
Acquisition channels with UTM attribution
Landing Pages with funnel metrics by URL
Event table with debug and deduplication alerts
Active, trial and canceled subscription management
Period comparison with AI analysis
Native Stripe integration (webhooks + full history sync)
AI analysis via Google Gemini 1.5 Flash with streaming
tracker.js — tracking script (2.1 kB, zero dependencies)
Shareable public page per organization
Multi-tenant with team support and email invites
Regional settings (currency, timezone)
